satisfied_acceptance_criteria: Package can be imported and has a bounded module layout suitable for later CLI and docs work.
All required workflow objects, gate types, and decision states are represented explicitly.

Engine blocks story completion before story post-review approval, milestone completion before all stories and milestone review approval, final success before strategic final approval, tool execution before approved tool-request review, and further implementation work when user input is required.
Failure dossier entries are created for requires_rework, blocked_user_input_required, and full_stop decisions with tests covering each state.

validation.command: python -B -m pytest -q -p no:cacheprovider tests/test_domain_vocabulary.py tests/test_gate_advancement_rules.py tests/test_failure_dossier_decisions.py
